rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MORTGAGE LENDER SERVICES, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 15, 2022 line 1. HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS Hearing Required. The deposited funds of $390,362.24 shall be distributed as follows: $234,768.70 shall be transferred to Claimant EWB to satisfy Sheldon Fong's judgment lien and the remaining balance of $155,593.45 transferred to Claimant Sheldon Fong. The parties shall contact Fiscal Services Division of the Superior Court to request the funds: AREVENUE@SFTC.ORG =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: CHERIE POWER VS. IGNACIO CONG FONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reopen Discovery, Extend The Deadline For The Court To Hear A Discovery Motion And Compel The Deposition Of Steven Adair Macdonald
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 15, 2022 line 2. PLAINTIFF CHERIE POWER'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO REOPEN DISCOVERY, EXTEND THE DEADLINE FOR THE COURT TO HEAR A DISCOVERY MOTION AND COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF STEVEN ADAIR MACDONALD is GRANTED. Discovery is reopened for the limited purpose of taking Mr. MacDonald's deposition. The statutory witness fee and milage rate for non-retained expert witnesses shall apply. (CCP Section 2020.230(a).) The Deposition shall proceed on a mutually agreed upon date and place, but in no event later than April 17, 2022. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: BETSY CAI VS. AMANDA SCHRICK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: APPLICATION TO PREVENT FORFEITURE DUE TO COVID-19 RENTAL DEBT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 15, 2022 line 7. DEFENDANT AMANDA SCHRICK'S APPLICATION TO PREVENT FORFEITURE DUE TO COVID-19 RENTAL DEBT Hearing Required re: status of payment. This matter was continued from the April 8, 2022 calendar for Defendant to contact Housing is Key. Defendant should come prepared with information from Housing is Key with respect to (i) when payment was made; (ii) to whom it was made; (iii) the date of mailing, (iv) and the address where payment was sent. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
